title: Bridge Atlas - Episode 5: Verifiability | Shreya Shankar & Justin Drake
description:
Shreya Shankar is a PhD student at UC Berkeley’s Electrical engineering and Computer Science Department. She builds open-source LLM-powered data systems, including the DocETL stack. Justin Drake is leads the Lean Ethereum initiative, an ambitious roadmap for Ethereum’s long-term development. Justin and Shreya build bridges between the fields of artificial intelligence and cryptography through a conversation that ranges from trust to tensions. This is a technical conversation, but high-level enough for generalists to engage with. 

Last chance to sign up for Bridge Atlas Day at Devconnect: https://devconnect.org/calendar?event=bridge-atlas

22:05 - Counterfactuals and other missing information
28:02 - Maliciousness is easier to manage than incompetence
33:58 - Inherent tensions in verifiability

49:32 - Sibling concepts to verifiability
